stemHtml: A flight instructor is teaching a student of a multi-engine piston airplane the practice of an engine failure. What is the most favourable configuration during the first engine failure exercise?

options.a: An airplane mass of 4 400 lbs so that the resultant yaw from the engine failure is minimized.
options.b: An airplane mass of 3 800 lbs so that the resultant yaw from the engine failure is minimized.
options.c: An airplane mass of 4 400 lbs so that the rudder has greater effectiveness.
options.d: An airplane mass of 3 800 lbs so that the rudder has greater effectiveness.
